prompts.label: Claude Code controlled implementation prompt
prompts.content:
# Claude Code controlled implementation prompt

AI coders are workers, not architects. Fetch this Matrix Bundle and implement TASK-001 only. Edit only allowed files and run validation before finishing.
hard_constraints: AI coder is worker, not architect
Implement one Matrix task only
Do not modify Matrix control files
No unapproved dependencies
